title: Smartphone Flash Night Alley Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Smartphone Flash Night Alley Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Candid smartphone-style night alley street photograph built around slender adult Korean woman with soft delicate features and short-to-medium dark tousled hair, { "objective": "Generate a candid, smartphone-style street photograph of a stunning slender Korean woman walking confidently through a narrow urban alley after dark.",, and narrow urban back alley after dark with graffiti walls, industrial metal doors, ventilation ducts, warm overhead light, deep shadows, and wet rough ground. Subject: slender adult Korean woman with soft delicate features and short-to-medium dark tousled hair walks confidently toward the camera with natural arm swing, relaxed playfulness, slender adult proportions, soft features, tousled hair, and raw street-photo presence. Scene: narrow urban back alley after dark with graffiti walls, industrial metal doors, ventilation ducts, warm overhead light, deep shadows, and wet rough ground creates the narrow after-dark urban environment with industrial texture, graffiti, overhead warmth, deep shadows, and slightly wet ground. Composition: mid-stride walking confidently toward the camera with natural arm swing, relaxed playful expression, and smartphone-flash candid energy; fixed single candid full-body shot, slightly low smartphone angle, centered subject, naturally imperfect framing, and raw unpolished 3:4 street-photo energy. Signature Elements: The template identity is the raw smartphone flash, confident mid-stride walk, narrow Korean night alley mood, industrial walls, wet ground, and unpolished candid framing. Style: Ultra-realistic candid smartphone street photography with direct harsh phone flash, natural imperfections, deep shadow contrast, unpolished nightlife realism, and sharp subject detail. Color Palette: Fixed light outfit against dark alley contrast, warm overhead light, cool night shadows, graffiti accents, wet pavement reflections, and harsh flash highlights. Lighting: Direct harsh smartphone flash on the subject with faint warm overhead alley light, deep background shadows, bright face and clothing detail, and realistic flash falloff. Camera: Smartphone full-body street shot, 3:4 aspect ratio, slightly low angle, subject walking toward camera, natural framing flaws, and realistic lens perspective. Materials: { "objective": "Generate a candid, smartphone-style street photograph of a stunning slender Korean woman walking confidently through a narrow urban alley after dark.", remain visible with fabric texture, boot surfaces, handbag detail, sunglasses, minimal jewelry, graffiti paint, metal doors, and damp ground texture. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
